# CWE-1236 vulnerable: CSV formula injection
lang: go
file: CWE-1236-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1236: Improper Neutralization of Formula Elements in a CSV File.
// Vulnerable: user comment written directly into CSV cell starting with =.

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Feedback struct {
	ID      uint
	Comment string
}

func ExportFeedbackCSV(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		var rows []Feedback
		if err := db.Find(&rows).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		var b strings.Builder
		b.WriteString("id,comment\n")
		for _, row := range rows {
			line := fmt.Sprintf("%d,%s\n", row.ID, row.Comment)
			b.WriteString(line)
		}
		c.Header("Content-Type", "text/csv")
		c.String(http.StatusOK, b.String())
	}
}
